title: Rarity Tooltips For Hypixel SkyBlock
description: A Rarity Tooltips Texture Pack For Hypixel SkyBlock.
body:
It's **necessary** to have **Legendary Tooltips,Iceberg,and Prism mod** for this resource pack to work, get it here: 
Legendary Tooltips: **https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips**
Iceberg: **https://modrinth.com/mod/iceberg**
Prism: **https://modrinth.com/mod/prism-lib**

### Rarity Tooltips For SkyBlock v2.2+ needs Iceberg 1.1.24

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/380b280b9178b6ef937fac4bd80dfa26bd02fb3c.png)
